name: playwright-saucedemo
description: Playwright POM Framework with Allure Reporting

scripts.test:allure: npm run clean:allure && npx playwright test && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.test:headed:allure: npm run clean:allure && npx playwright test --headed && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.test:checkout:allure: npm run clean:allure && npx playwright test tests/checkout.spec.ts --headed && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.test:login:allure: npm run clean:allure && npx playwright test tests/login.spec.ts --headed && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.smoke:ci: npm run clean:allure && npm run smoke && npm run allure:generate
scripts.regression:ci: npm run clean:allure && npm run regression && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:cart:allure: npm run clean:allure && npx playwright test tests/cart.spec.ts --headed && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.test:addToCart:allure: npm run clean:allure && npx playwright test tests/addToCart.spec.ts --headed && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open

author: Kashyap Dave
